profile.name: Sagar Koirala
profile.title: Embedded Systems & Firmware Design Engineer
profile.overview: Designing robust, low-latency, and high-integrity hardware architectures and embedded software solutions from concept to production.

philosophy.title: SIGNAL INTEGRITY AT THE TRACE LEVEL
philosophy.description: Silicon behavior changes outside the pristine lab environment. I design multi-layer PCB stack-ups and optimize high-speed hardware paths specifically to isolate signal corruption and transmission hazards before they reach the execution loop.

philosophy.title: STABILITY THROUGH EDGE STRESS TESTING
philosophy.description: System reliability cannot be proved in a vacuum. From tracing unstable power rails to mapping task routines in RTOS environments, every component layer must survive aggressive hardware bring-up, signal probing, and exhaustive logic-analyzer verification.

philosophy.title: BRIDGING HARDWARE WITH FIRMWARE LAYER
philosophy.description: System integration slows down when engineering disciplines live in isolation. I actively bridge the gap between schematic board designs and low-level code architecture, developing custom device drivers and testing scripts to keep deployment cycles moving.

projectsMeta.title: Atlas Telemetry Unit & CANbridge
projectsMeta.summary: 4-layer automotive STM32 telemetry system streaming real-time vehicle data over LTE and USB CDC.

projectsMeta.title: TelloESP32 Open-Source Library
projectsMeta.summary: Production-ready C++ Arduino library for UDP flight control and H.264 video streaming from dual-core ESP32.

bullets: Operated UHF/VHF ground station for BIRDS-3 CubeSat missions.
Developed LoRa-based telemetry terminals for Himalayan glacial lake monitoring.
Designed fault-tolerant STM32 secondary bootloader using custom CAN protocol.
Built reaction wheel driver and Altium PCB for Magnetic Torquer test rig.
Developed CANsense C++/Qt tool for real-time CAN bus telemetry and reverse engineering.
Reduced vehicle signal decoding time by 70% for field engineers.

testimonials.title: Embedded UI & Firmware Delivery
testimonials.text: Sagar was extremely professional, knowledgeable and communicative. He finished my project in due time and went above and beyond. I highly recommend him for your electronic programming needs!

testimonials.title: Drone Telemetry Integration
testimonials.text: The freelancer consistently completed tasks on time with excellent results. Outstanding skills, extensive experience, and exceptional support—highly recommended!

logistics.visaStatus: ED Visa Holder; Clear for Work Permit Transition
